prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You’ve got this! Remember, the hardest part is just starting. Once you take that first step, momentum will carry you forward. You are more than capable, and whatever challenge this task brings, you’ve already overcome so much more before. Take a deep breath, trust yourself, and dive in—you’ll be amazed at what you can accomplish. Future you will thank you! Let’s do this!
